# Kegel Morse Hero Pelvic Train

## Summary
Kegel Morse Hero is a free iOS app that combines pelvic floor (Kegel) exercises with Morse code rhythmic patterns. It uses visual ring animations and haptic feedback to guide squeeze-and-relax timing during exercise sessions.

## Key Facts
- Platform: iOS only
- Price: Free to download (optional subscription for additional features)
- Category: Health & Fitness — Pelvic Floor Training
- No account required
- No ads, no tracking, no data collection
- All exercise data stored locally on device
- No internet connection required for exercise sessions
- Optional Google Drive backup and CSV export

## How It Works
Kegel Morse Hero displays a glowing ring animation that indicates when to squeeze and when to relax. Each exercise session follows a Morse code pattern — dots represent short squeezes, dashes represent long holds. Haptic feedback vibrates in sync with the pattern for discreet, eyes-free training.

## Built-in Tracks
- SOS (16 seconds)
- HELLO (26 seconds)
- HELP ME (28 seconds)
- HERO (20 seconds)
- KEGEL (22 seconds)
- MORSE (23 seconds)
- BRAVO (28 seconds)
- READY (24 seconds)
- FOCUS (29 seconds)

Users can also create custom Morse code tracks.

## Features
- Visual ring animation for squeeze/relax timing
- Haptic feedback during exercises
- 1×, 2×, 3× speed settings
- Built-in and custom Morse code tracks
- Calendar-based progress tracking
- Zen Mode for distraction-free training
- Signal reminders for consistent scheduling
- History log with session details
- Google Drive backup
- CSV data export

## Privacy
Kegel Morse Hero collects no personal data. No analytics, no advertising SDKs, no tracking. All data remains on the user's device. No account creation required.

## Subscriptions
Subscription periods: Monthly, Annual, or Lifetime. Payment charged to iTunes Account. Auto-renews unless turned off 24+ hours before period end.

## Links
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6761061994
- Privacy Policy: https://benderlidze.github.io/KegelMorseHeroDocs/privacy
- Terms of Use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

## Disclaimer
This app is for educational and informational purposes only. It does not constitute medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Consult a physician or qualified health provider before starting pelvic floor exercises.
